categories.name: Things you keep a record in

decoys.reason_a: A tennis match or boxing match is a type of sporting event
decoys.reason_b: A match is a common tool used to light fires

decoys.category_a: Things you keep a record in
decoys.reason_a: A log is a written record of events like a ship's log
decoys.reason_b: A log is a piece of wood you burn in a fireplace

other_trick: RALLY tempts toward other meanings like a political rally or to rally support, TORCH can mean the verb to set fire to something, and SPARK can mean to trigger an idea or romance.
